stemHtml: Which urgency message has the ideal content and correct sequence?

options.a: PAN PAN x3, BREST CENTRE, F-BGGA, crew member unwell, request divert, 5 miles east of Ushant FL150 heading 95.
options.b: PAN PAN x3, BREST CENTRE, F-BGGA, at FL150 heading 95, crew member unwell...
options.c: PAN PAN x3, BREST CENTRE, F-BGGA, 5 miles east of Ushant, crew unwell...
options.d: PAN PAN x3, F-BGGA, 5 miles east of Ushant, crew unwell...
